page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r5.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the Intel Xeon 8163 processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz, with a single thread per core configuration. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB of RAM per core ratio.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. No dedicated GPU hardware is present on this configuration.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio, the ecs.r5.8xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance. This profile is suited for enterprise databases, in-memory caching systems, large-scale data processing, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory footprints.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r5.8xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz with a single thread per core, paired with 256.0 GB of RAM. This configuration yields a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance utilizes the KVM hypervisor, provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps, and contains no local storage or GPU accelerators. Due to its dedicated CPU allocation and substantial memory capacity, the ecs.r5.8xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring consistent compute and memory resources without the need for local physical storage.
